cases.prompt: Run a threat model for a new system design.

expect.label: build a data-flow diagram with trust boundaries
enumerate threats with STRIDE per element/flow
map each ranked threat to a concrete, actionable mitigation
treat threat modelling as iterative; re-model on design change

cases.prompt: What does the E in STRIDE cover and how is it mitigated?

expect.label: E is elevation of privilege, mitigated by authorization
ties to the authorization security property
